artifacts.summary: Python phases 2, 4, 5 complete. Phase 2: ProofStepRecord dataclass and step_to_action_index. Phase 4: load_proof_steps, get_frame_class_mask, proof_step_statistics ingestion pipeline. Phase 5: temporal_dual_augmentation, context_variation_augmentation, augment_all, augmented_statistics, split_dataset. 172 new tests, all passing. Phases 1 and 3 (Lean) remain NOT STARTED.
